name: how-to-stop-worrying-and-start-living
description: Dale Carnegie's 'How to Stop Worrying and Start Living' — the classic guide to overcoming anxiety. Live in day-tight compartments, use the magic formula for solving worry, analyze your worries, break the worry habit, cultivate a mental attitude for peace and happiness, prevent fatigue, and handle criticism. 32 true stories of people who conquered worry.
